project_type: libGDX 1.12.1 desktop game (LWJGL3 backend), roguelike dungeon crawler
build_system: Gradle 8.11 with wrapper (./gradlew). Source directory is 'src' (flat, no src/main/java). Packages: model/, controller/, view/
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation is compile-only via ./gradlew classes
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew classes and confirm BUILD SUCCESSFUL. No runtime tests possible (no display server in sandbox).
setup_instructions: Java 17 is available via mise (mise.toml in root). Run ./gradlew classes to verify build.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No display server available so cannot run the game visually. Validation is compile-only. All sprites generated programmatically via Pixmap - no external image downloads needed.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT modify model/ or controller/ directories. Only modify/create files in view/. All sprites must be Pixmap-generated at runtime. Use 320x240 internal resolution. Maintain nearest-neighbor filtering. Commit to phase2-decouple-logic branch.
key_patterns: AssetLoader centralizes asset creation/disposal. PixelRenderer wraps SpriteBatch at 320x240. AnimationManager queues GameEvents as visual animations with durations. GameScreen orchestrates HUD/CombatMenu/EnemyDisplay/MessageLog. GameEventListener interface (onEvent) is used throughout. All UI renders at absolute pixel coordinates within 320x240 space. ShapeRenderer used for HP bars (called outside batch.begin/end). CombatEngine exposes getCurrentEnemy(), getPlayer(), getCurrentWave(), getCurrentState().
directory_structure: src/model/ - game logic (DO NOT MODIFY), src/controller/ - game flow (DO NOT MODIFY), src/view/ - libGDX rendering layer (CAN MODIFY), src/view/rendering/ - PixelRenderer + AnimationManager + ScreenShake, src/view/assets/ - AssetLoader, src/view/screens/ - Screen implementations, src/view/ui/ - HUD/CombatMenu/EnemyDisplay/MessageLog
